hero.headline:
Tampa's Fastest-Growing Pool Service
Company
hero.subheadline: Griffin and his CPO-certified team deliver the kind of pool care that IHG Hotels and Marriott trust for their guests. Now that same precision and reliability is available for your backyard. No contracts, just consistently perfect water.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Hotel-Grade Pool Care<br class="hidden md:block"> for Your Tampa Home
services.subtitle: From weekly full-service cleaning to storm recovery, Precision Pools handles every detail so the only thing you worry about is which float to grab.

cards.title: Full Cleaning Service
cards.description: Complete weekly maintenance: chemical balancing, wall and tile brushing, skimmer cleaning, pump basket emptying, surface netting, vacuuming, and monthly filter maintenance.

cards.title: Chemicals Only
cards.description: Weekly chemical testing and balancing to keep your water safe and crystal clear. Perfect for pool owners who handle physical cleaning but want expert water chemistry.

cards.title: No-Vacuum Service
cards.description: Everything in our full service minus vacuuming — ideal if you have a robotic cleaner. Includes chemical balancing, brushing, skimming, equipment checks, and filter maintenance.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Care
cards.description: Hotel-grade maintenance trusted by IHG and Marriott properties. Dedicated account management, compliance reporting, and flexible scheduling for any commercial facility.

cards.title: After-Storm Cleanup
cards.description: Tampa storms hit hard. We respond fast to remove debris, restore water clarity, and get your pool back to safe swimming conditions — often within 24 hours.

cards.title: Equipment Monitoring & Repair
cards.description: Regular inspection of pumps, filters, heaters, and salt systems. We catch small problems before they become expensive repairs and keep your equipment running efficiently.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Resort-Quality Pool

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Consultation
steps.description: We visit your home, assess your pool, and build a custom care plan — no pressure, no obligation. You'll get an honest quote within 24 hours.

steps.title: We Show Up Like Clockwork
steps.description: Your CPO-certified technician arrives on schedule every week. Cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks — handled with the same precision we bring to five-star hotels.

steps.title: Enjoy Resort-Quality Water
steps.description: Your pool stays sparkling, balanced, and swim-ready all year round. If anything is ever off, one call and we're back out to make it right — free.

about.label: Why Tampa Trusts Precision Pools
about.headline: Owner-Operated, Hotel-Tested, Neighbor-Approved
about.description: Griffin Shahmanesh founded Precision Pools in 2022 after graduating from Lynn University and recognizing that Tampa deserved better pool care. In just four years, that vision has made Precision Pools Tampa's fastest-growing pool service. The same meticulous standards that earn trust from IHG Hotels and Marriott properties go into every residential pool we touch. Griffin personally oversees operations, and every technician is CPO-certified and background-checked. This is not a franchise or a side hustle — it is a local company built on doing the job right, every single week.

features.title: Background-Checked, CPO-Certified Team
features.description: Every technician passes a thorough background check and holds CPO certification. You always know exactly who is in your backyard and that they know what they are doing.

features.title: No Contracts. Cancel Anytime.
features.description: We earn your business every visit. No long-term commitments, no cancellation fees, no surprises. Stay because your pool has never looked better.

features.title: Free In-Home Consultation First
features.description: Before any service begins, we visit your home, assess your pool's unique needs, and give you an honest recommendation — completely free, zero obligation.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Hidden Fees.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service that fits your pool and your budget. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime — no contracts, no penalties.

guarantee.headline: Our "Precision Perfect" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call us and we will come back and redo it at no charge — no questions asked. We hold ourselves to the same standard that five-star hotels demand, and we will not rest until your pool meets it.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within 3-5 business days after their free in-home consultation. For storm cleanup emergencies, we offer same-day or next-day response. Just call and we will work with your schedule.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our Tampa clients provide gate access and we handle everything while you are away. You will always know what was done — Griffin and the team maintain clear communication after every visit.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified and background-checked?
faqs.answer: Yes, every single one. All Precision Pools technicians are CPO-certified (Certified Pool Operator) and pass a comprehensive background check before they ever step foot on your property.

faqs.question: What if I want to cancel?
faqs.answer: Cancel anytime with zero fees. We do not do contracts or cancellation penalties — ever. We believe in earning your trust every week, and if we are not the right fit, parting ways should be simple.

faqs.question: Do you service commercial pools and hotels?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We are trusted by major hospitality brands including IHG Hotels and Marriott properties. Commercial clients receive dedicated account management, compliance reporting, and flexible scheduling tailored to their needs.

testimonials.name: Wendy S.
testimonials.text: I am really impressed with Precision Pools. Griffin is reliable, polite and efficient. He is very accommodating and pays attention to detail. I would highly recommend him.

testimonials.name: Gilberto G.
testimonials.text: Highly recommend Griffin and his team for any of your pool service needs. Extremely professional & Top notch customer service.

testimonials.name: Terry L.
testimonials.text: What a great company. Owner is always responsive and their work is second to none. Strongly recommend this company.
